title: The Last Man Who Knew How to Dream
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: In a world where humanity has bio-engineered away the need for sleep, the last surviving dreamer becomes a fugitive as his nightmares literally manifest into reality, and a government agency known as the Wake must decide whether to preserve or erase the only person who can still imagine something new.
long_description: In a world where humanity has bio-engineered away the need for sleep, the last surviving dreamer becomes a fugitive as his nightmares literally manifest into reality, and a government agency known as the Wake must decide whether to preserve or erase the only person who can still imagine something new.
